mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_meal_config WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM plan_meal_config WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND day_type = #{dayType} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_meal_config (plan_id, day_type, meal_type, carb_ratio, protein_ratio, fat_ratio, sort_order) VALUES (#{planId}, #{dayType}, #{mealType}, #{carbRatio}, #{proteinRatio}, #{fatRatio}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO plan_meal_config (plan_id, day_type, meal_type, carb_ratio, protein_ratio, fat_ratio, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.planId}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.mealType}, #{item.carbRatio}, #{item.proteinRatio}, #{item.fatRatio}, #{item.sortOrder})
